instructionsection.title: ST1H (scalar plus immediate, single register) -- A64
instructionsection.heading: ST1H (scalar plus immediate, single register)

brief.para: Contiguous store halfwords from vector (immediate index)

authored.para: This instruction performs a contiguous store of halfwords from elements of a vector register to the memory address generated by a 64-bit scalar base and immediate index in the range -8 to 7 that is multiplied by the vector's in-memory size, irrespective of predication, and added to the base address. Inactive elements are not written to memory.

uses_dit.condition: FEAT_SVE2 is implemented or FEAT_SME is implemented

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction is a data-independent-time instruction as described in About PSTATE.DIT.

a.hover: Is the name of the scalable vector register to be transferred, encoded in the "Zt" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the optional signed immediate vector offset, in the range -8 to 7, defaulting to 0, encoded in the "imm4" field.

ps.name: A64.sve.sve_memst_si.sve_mem_cst_si.st1h_z_p_bi_

intro.para: Is the name of the scalable vector register to be transferred, encoded in the "Zt" field.
Is the name of the governing scalable predicate register P0-P7, encoded in the "Pg" field.
Is the 64-bit name of the general-purpose base register or stack pointer, encoded in the "Rn" field.
Is the optional signed immediate vector offset, in the range -8 to 7, defaulting to 0, encoded in the "imm4" field.

ps.name: A64.sve.sve_memst_si.sve_mem_cst_si.st1h_z_p_bi_
